prompt: A dramatic Japanese food advertisement poster for a premium pork rice bowl, vertical composition, black and fiery orange background with glowing embers, smoke, and a high-contrast gourmet marketing look. The main focus is an oversized bowl of butadon in the lower center, filled with white rice and topped with many thick slices of glossy grilled pork belly, richly lacquered with dark sweet soy glaze, visible char marks, caramelized edges, and a stream of sauce pouring down from above onto the meat. Make the food look hyper-appetizing, juicy, rich, and slightly exaggerated like a restaurant flyer. Large bold brushed gold Japanese headline text dominates the upper left: 帯広の肉厚豚丼. Across the middle, a gold paint-stroke banner contains black Japanese text: 極上の炭火焼き。極上のタレ。. On the right side, add a cute anime girl mascot standing behind the bowl, about half-body visible, wearing a black-and-white cow-themed hoodie with small horns, long blonde hair, frilly sleeves, and a shy delighted pose with one hand near her mouth; keep her face intentionally obscured by a plain beige rectangle censor block. Add vertical white Japanese copy along the right edge in 2 separate text groups: 1 at the upper right, 1 larger at the mid-to-lower right. Add a small handwritten-style white note near the girl with a tiny heart. In the lower left, include a dark circular callout badge with gold rim and white/yellow Japanese text about charcoal grilling and flavor. Along the very bottom, place 3 circular ingredient-feature icons with exact labels beneath them: raw pork slices labeled 肉厚!, glowing charcoal embers labeled 炭火焼き!, and glossy dark sauce labeled 極上ダレ!. At the bottom right, add a huge energetic gold brush-calligraphy slogan with splattered paint effects, plus a smaller white sentence beneath it. Use intense lighting, glossy highlights, premium yakiniku flyer aesthetics, dense Japanese typography, bold brush fonts, and a mouthwatering late-night food terror vibe.
